title: Chad warns Sudan it will retaliate after drone strike on mourners kills 17
content: President Idris Mahamat Déby orders the military to be on high alert and a "total closure" of the border.

title: Denounce 'abject' Afcon decision - senior Caf member
content: Caf executive committee member Augustin Senghor says the decision to strip Senegal of the 2025 Afcon title is "unacceptable, abject and we have to denounce it".

content: It comes during the Nigerian president's state visit to the UK - the first by a west African leader in 37 years.

content: Following Palestine allegations, FIFA clears Israeli settlement clubs but fines Israel FA for discrimination breaches.

content: The Trump administration revoked key scientific finding that formed a basis for regulations to address climate change.

content: News of the invitation emerges after the monarch acknowledged "a lot of abuse" during the Spanish conquest of Mexico.

title: English dominance of Champions League group phase prompts debate
